_comment: Tool-call fixture: lets CC start in /tmp (which has bypassPermissions mode by default), auto-accepts trust, asks CC to list files using bash. Goal: capture a real tool_use + tool_result pair in the JSONL plus the screen states CC renders during a tool call. We'll use this to design parsers for tool_use rendering, the in-flight tool indicator, and (later) the approval prompt UI.

steps.data: use the bash tool to list the files in this directory and tell me how many there are
